# Exploratory analysis

::: {.lang-en}
VST-normalised counts (blind = TRUE); PCA and sample correlation use the top 500 most-variable genes.
:::

::: {.lang-ko}
VST 정규화 카운트(blind = TRUE); PCA와 샘플 상관 모두 variable 상위 500개 유전자를 사용합니다.
:::

```{r expl-load}
pca_path <- rp("results", "exploratory", "pca.rds")
cor_path <- rp("results", "exploratory", "sample_correlation.rds")

pca_obj <- if (file.exists(pca_path)) readRDS(pca_path) else NULL
cor_obj <- if (file.exists(cor_path)) readRDS(cor_path) else NULL
```

## PCA (top 500 variable genes)

```{r expl-pca, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=5.5}
if (is.null(pca_obj) || is.null(pca_obj$scores) || nrow(pca_obj$scores) == 0) {
  no_results("PCA output not available.")
} else {
  scores <- pca_obj$scores
  ve     <- pca_obj$var_explained
  pc1_lbl <- sprintf("PC1 (%.1f%%)", 100 * (ve[["PC1"]] %||% NA))
  pc2_lbl <- sprintf("PC2 (%.1f%%)", 100 * (ve[["PC2"]] %||% NA))
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(scores,
       ggplot2::aes(x = PC1, y = PC2, colour = condition, shape = as.factor(batch),
                    label = sample, text = sample)) +
    ggplot2::geom_point(size = 3) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = sample), nudge_y = 0.04,
                       size = 3, show.legend = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = pc1_lbl, y = pc2_lbl, colour = "condition", shape = "batch") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  if (is_html_report()) {
    fig <- plotly::ggplotly(p, tooltip = c("text", "colour", "shape"), height = 500)
    plotly::layout(fig, margin = list(t = 30, b = 30, l = 40, r = 20))
  } else {
    p
  }
}
```

### Scree plot

```{r expl-scree, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=4}
if (is.null(pca_obj) || is.null(pca_obj$var_explained) || length(pca_obj$var_explained) == 0) {
  no_results("Variance-explained vector not available.")
} else {
  ve <- pca_obj$var_explained
  scree <- data.frame(
    PC  = factor(names(ve), levels = names(ve)),
    pct = as.numeric(ve) * 100
  )
  n_show <- min(10, nrow(scree))
  scree <- head(scree, n_show)
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(scree, ggplot2::aes(x = PC, y = pct)) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(fill = "#4c7fb0") +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = "% variance explained") +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12)
  p
}
```

## Sample-sample correlation (Spearman on top-500 variable VST genes)

```{r expl-corheat, fig.width=7.5, fig.height=6.5}
if (is.null(cor_obj) || is.null(cor_obj$spearman)) {
  no_results("Sample correlation matrix not available.")
} else {
  M <- cor_obj$spearman
  ord <- if (!is.null(cor_obj$hclust)) cor_obj$hclust$order else seq_len(nrow(M))
  M <- M[ord, ord, drop = FALSE]
  df <- as.data.frame(as.table(M))
  names(df) <- c("sample_x", "sample_y", "rho")
  df$sample_x <- factor(df$sample_x, levels = rownames(M))
  df$sample_y <- factor(df$sample_y, levels = rownames(M))
  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(df, ggplot2::aes(x = sample_x, y = sample_y, fill = rho)) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile() +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(label = sprintf("%.3f", rho)),
                       size = 3, colour = "grey20") +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradient(low = "#ffffff", high = "#4c7fb0",
                                 limits = c(min(df$rho, na.rm = TRUE), 1)) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, fill = expression(rho)) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(6, 10, 14, 10)
    )
  p
}
```

## Hierarchical clustering (1 − Spearman, average linkage)

```{r expl-dendro, fig.width=8, fig.height=4.5}
if (is.null(cor_obj) || is.null(cor_obj$hclust)) {
  no_results("Clustering dendrogram not available.")
} else {
  hc <- cor_obj$hclust
  op <- graphics::par(mar = c(6, 1, 1, 1))
  plot(hc, main = "", xlab = "", sub = "", ylab = "", yaxt = "n", hang = -1)
  graphics::par(op)
}
```
